<!-- source-hash: 1b37ac8892c773ebdd34fa66de8da91b -->
Maps internal `Event` domain objects and query results to their external REST API response DTOs for the OpenFrame event system.

## Key Components

| Method | Input | Output | Description |
|--------|-------|--------|-------------|
| `toEventResponse` | `Event` | `EventResponse` | Maps a single event document to its REST response DTO |
| `toEventResponseList` | `List<Event>` | `List<EventResponse>` | Maps a collection of events using stream processing |
| `toEventFilterResponse` | `EventFilters` | `EventFilterResponse` | Maps filter criteria (user IDs, event types) to a response DTO |
| `toEventsResponse` | `GenericQueryResult<Event>` | `EventsResponse` | Maps a paginated query result to a response DTO including page info |

All methods return `null` safely when the input is `null`.

## Usage Example

```java
@RestController
@RequiredArgsConstructor
public class EventController {

    private final EventService eventService;
    private final EventMapper eventMapper;

    // Map a single event
    @GetMapping("/events/{id}")
    public EventResponse getEvent(@PathVariable String id) {
        Event event = eventService.findById(id);
        return eventMapper.toEventResponse(event);
    }

    // Map a paginated result set
    @GetMapping("/events")
    public EventsResponse getEvents(EventFilters filters) {
        GenericQueryResult<Event> result = eventService.query(filters);
        return eventMapper.toEventsResponse(result);
    }

    // Map available filter options
    @GetMapping("/events/filters")
    public EventFilterResponse getFilters() {
        EventFilters filters = eventService.getAvailableFilters();
        return eventMapper.toEventFilterResponse(filters);
    }
}
```
